title: Junior Product Marketing Manager
required_skills: Store In-App Events execution (Apple App Store & Google Play)
GTM execution for features and live-ops events
Cross-functional coordination (Product, Live Ops, Creative, UA, Community)
Launch briefs, timelines, checklists, and internal documentation
bonus_skills: Creative team partnership for visual/asset requirements
matched_skills: GTM strategy and product launch execution
KPI dashboards and performance tracking / ROI reporting
Project management (briefs, timelines, documentation via Agile/Scrum)
missing_skills: Apple App Store & Google Play In-App Events — no mobile app store experience in CV
Mobile gaming / B2C consumer gaming context — CV is entirely B2B
Community channel messaging in gaming context
core_responsibilities: Own end-to-end Store In-App Events across Apple App Store and Google Play
Support GTM execution for features, live-ops events, and content updates
Prepare briefs, timelines, checklists, and internal documentation for launches
Maintain messaging frameworks and brand consistency across store, UA, and community
Track In-App Event performance and extract learnings to improve visibility and conversion
recommended_emphasis: GTM execution track record — highlight product launch ownership and cross-functional coordination at Intelligent Power and GRG Banking
Messaging and positioning frameworks — emphasise value proposition and brand consistency work
Performance tracking — Power BI certification and KPI reporting experience to show data-driven approach to store/launch optimisation
Documentation and launch ops — Hapag-Lloyd sprint coordination and internal documentation experience
Pivot framing: position B2B product marketing breadth as transferable foundation, acknowledge mobile gaming as new context to grow into

overqualification_flag.reason: Candidate has 4+ years of experience including a Marketing Manager and PMO title; this is a junior role reporting to Head of Product Marketing. Seniority gap may raise recruiter concern. Recommend framing as intentional industry pivot (B2B → gaming) rather than a step-down.

company_info.size_raw: No company size information found in JD text
